name: Honeywell International
analysis: HON has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at $224.8530. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at $226.0789 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry $224.8530, stop $203.4648, target $227.4002. Risk/reward is 0.12:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
